welcome_desc: Please select your system language to start a flawless, fast, and secure Linux experience.
welcome_warning_body: If you plan to install alongside Windows, BitLocker, Fast Startup and hibernation must be disabled. Otherwise, the dual-boot option will remain locked on the disk screen.
theme_desc: Select a visual style for your installation and dashboard experience.
theme_dark_desc: Deep space navy, luminous violet edges, and cyan data glow for premium low-light focus.
theme_light_desc: Creamy glass surfaces, soft lavender light, and bright clarity for daytime sessions.
light_desc: Vibrant, colorful and professional look for well-lit environments.
dark_desc: Deep purple & navy tones optimized for reduced eye strain and modern aesthetics.
location_desc: Set your physical location, timezone and preferred keyboard layout.
location_summary_note: These defaults are applied to the installed Ro-ASD system during first boot.
location_recommended_language_ready: A matching installer translation is available for this region.
location_recommended_language_draft: The recommended installer translation is still in draft, but the installed system locale will still use this region.
net_desc: Choose how you'd like to connect to the internet. A connection is required for real-time updates.
net_connect_failed: Failed to connect to {ssid}. Please check password.
net_offline_hint: If you do not want to connect right now, continue with the offline button below.
acc_desc: Set up the primary user account for this system.
acc_username_rule: Use lowercase letters, digits, '_' or '-'. The first character must be a letter or underscore.
acc_err_username_invalid: Use lowercase letters, digits, '_' or '-'. The first character cannot be a digit.
acc_err_password_short: Password must be at least 4 characters
admin_sub: Grants root (sudo) privileges. Essential for system management.
acc_privilege_model_admin: This account can use sudo and perform system-level maintenance after installation.
acc_privilege_model_standard: This account will operate without administrative rights until elevated by another user.
acc_password_policy_body: Ro-Installer validates the password locally before the install pipeline writes account data into Ro-ASD.
type_desc:
Choose the configuration that best suits your performance
needs and technical expertise.
type_std_desc: Recommended for most users. Provides a stable environment with standard optimizations and automated configuration. Ideal for reliable long-term usage.
type_adv_desc: For power users and developers. Includes the latest experimental features, manual kernel configuration, and custom dependency management.
type_adv_feature_b: Manual storage tools and experimental path
disk_desc: Select a target disk and preferred partition method. All data on the selected disk may be erased.
disk_missing_target: Please select the installation target disk.
disk_live_target_body: The selected drive is the currently running Live ISO media. Active boot media cannot be formatted.
disk_safe_confirm_body: {disk} is a virtual test disk. It will not affect your physical drives. Do you want to continue?
disk_danger_confirm_body: All data on {disk} will be permanently erased. Do you confirm this action?
disk_alongside_confirm_body: {disk} will be used for an alongside installation without erasing the whole disk. About {size} will be reserved for Linux; {source} may be shrunk if needed. Before continuing, Windows must be fully shut down and important data should be backed up.
disk_plan_hint: Choose the installation mode here. Ro-ASD installs with a fixed BTRFS root filesystem.
disk_alongside_ready_with_source: Alongside is ready. Up to {size} can be reserved using {partition} ({fs}) or existing contiguous free space.
disk_alongside_ready_free: Alongside is ready. Up to {size} can be reserved from the existing contiguous free space on this disk.
disk_tone_unassigned_subtitle: No target has been selected yet.
disk_tone_live_subtitle: Active boot media cannot be used as the install target.
disk_tone_host_subtitle: This drive currently hosts the running system. Proceed carefully.
disk_tone_safe_subtitle: Virtual or controlled test environment detected.
disk_alongside_size_shrink_desc: The existing system partition will be shrunk within safe limits according to the selected size, then new Ro-ASD space will be allocated.
disk_alongside_size_free_desc: Existing contiguous free space on the disk will be used to allocate new Ro-ASD space.
disk_empty_desc: Refresh after attaching storage or check whether the current environment can enumerate block devices.
disk_blocker_boot_mode_not_uefi: The live session was not booted in UEFI mode. Dual-boot is only enabled for UEFI + GPT systems.
disk_blocker_partition_table_not_gpt: The selected disk is not GPT. The first safe release only supports alongside installs on GPT disks.
disk_blocker_missing_efi: No reusable EFI partition was found. This flow currently requires an existing EFI system partition.
disk_blocker_no_existing_os: No existing Windows/Linux installation was detected on this disk for alongside shrinking.
disk_blocker_no_shrink_candidate: No shrinkable NTFS or EXT4 system partition was found.
disk_blocker_bitlocker_enabled: BitLocker or BitLocker metadata was detected. Disable encryption in Windows and perform a full shutdown before retrying.
disk_blocker_ntfs_hibernated_or_fast_sta: The NTFS partition appears hibernated or affected by Fast Startup. Disable hibernation and Fast Startup in Windows, then perform a full shutdown.
disk_blocker_ntfs_dirty: The NTFS partition is not in a clean state. Run chkdsk in Windows and perform a full shutdown before retrying.
disk_blocker_ntfs_resize_tool_missing: NTFS resize tooling is missing in this session. Alongside installs stay locked until ntfsresize is available.
disk_blocker_ext4_resize_tool_missing: resize2fs was not found for EXT4 shrinking.
disk_blocker_ext4_check_tool_missing: e2fsck was not found for EXT4 verification. Safe shrinking stays locked in this session.
disk_blocker_ntfs_check_failed: The NTFS safety check did not return a reliable result. Perform a full Windows shutdown and disk check, then retry.
disk_blocker_alongside_minimum_not_met: After evaluating contiguous free space together with the safe shrink boundary, at least 40 GB cannot be reserved for Linux.
disk_blocker_alongside_engine_pending: The alongside flow is being rebuilt. This sprint enables risk detection and UI guidance; the real shrink engine will re-enable the option once complete.
disk_target_hint: Choose the deployment target. Live media and host disks are highlighted before any destructive action is allowed.
disk_target_empty: Select a target disk to unlock filesystem and partition policy controls.
disk_capacity_note: Unallocated or reusable capacity available for Ro-ASD deployment.
part_desc: Create, delete, or format partitions. Minimum requirements: Root (/) partition and EFI System Partition.
part_no_usable_space: There is not enough usable space in this free area to create a new partition.
part_planned_warning: ATTENTION: The operation will be planned and will not be applied immediately.
part_reserved_gap_hint: {size} MB will be reserved at the end of the disk for GPT and alignment.
part_format_hint_rewrite: The selected filesystem will be rewritten during installation.
part_format_hint_keep: The existing filesystem will be preserved; only the mount target will be assigned.
part_resize_warning: ATTENTION: Because of data loss risk, it is safer to perform this operation from the existing operating system before installation.
part_err_missing_root: You must create a Root Directory (/) mount point for installation.
part_err_root_small: You must allocate at least 20 GB (about 20000 MB) for the root directory (/).
part_err_root_fs: The root directory (/) can only be installed with the btrfs filesystem.
part_err_root_format: The root directory (/) must be formatted during installation. Installing over an existing root partition while preserving it is not supported.
part_err_missing_efi: You need an EFI boot directory with the /boot/efi mount point.
part_err_efi_size: EFI (/boot/efi) size must be at least 100 MB and at most 2500 MB.
part_err_efi_fs: On UEFI systems, the EFI partition filesystem must be 'fat32'.
part_err_boot_small: If you create a separate /boot directory, it must be at least 500 MB.
part_err_boot_fs: If /boot is created separately, its filesystem must be btrfs. FAT32 is only used for /boot/efi.
part_err_boot_format: If you use a separate /boot, it must be formatted during installation to avoid mixing old kernel files.
part_err_swap_fs: The swap area filesystem must be 'linux-swap'.
part_err_missing_swap: A separate SWAP partition is required for hibernation support. In manual partitioning, assign the [SWAP] mount point.
part_validation_note: Validation checks root, EFI, optional /boot and SWAP mapping.
part_requirement_summary: Root / at least 20 GB  |  EFI FAT32 100-2500 MB
part_map_not_loaded: Disk map has not been loaded yet.
part_raw_map_hint: Raw partition layout and planned changes
part_select_row_hint: Partition details and all tools appear here. Select a row.
part_rule_root: Root (/) must be created and must be at least 20 GB btrfs.
part_rule_efi: EFI (/boot/efi) must be FAT32 and between 100 MB and 2500 MB.
part_rule_boot: If a separate /boot is used, it must be at least 500 MB and btrfs.
part_rule_swap: A separate SWAP partition is required for hibernation and must be assigned as [SWAP].
part_planned_format_unmounted: This block will be reformatted during installation.
part_planned_format_mount: This block will be formatted and used for {mount} during installation.
part_planned_none: No active installation operation is planned for this block.
part_planned_reuse_mount: This block will be reused for {mount} while preserving the existing filesystem.
kernel_summary_note: Ro-Installer writes this kernel policy into the final profile before file copy and bootloader stages begin.
kernel_network_required_message: Experimental channel requires an active network connection for package retrieval.
kernel_desc:
Configure your Ro-ASD environment by selecting between our battle-tested
stable kernel or the latest experimental features.
kernel_stable_desc: Recommended for production environments. Features long-term support, maximum security patches, and optimal reliability for daily operations.
kernel_exp_desc: For enthusiasts and developers. Includes early access to multi-threading optimizations, new UI frameworks, and upcoming Ro-ASD API hooks.
install_logs_empty: No logs have been produced yet.
install_terminal_empty: Installer logs will appear here as stages execute.
install_brand_body: While the installer backend works in real time, this area stays as the fixed branded status view.
install_website_prompt: For more details, visit our website.
install_runtime_note: While installation continues, the fixed card and slideshow keep reflecting the current state.
install_finished_success_body: Installation is complete. Review the logs if needed, then reboot now into the new system.
install_finished_failure_body: The installer reported a failure. Review the technical log stream to isolate the failing stage.
install_ready_reboot_button: You Are Ready, Please Reboot Now
disk_policy_note: Ro-Installer will apply the selected policy to the Ro-ASD deployment.
install_reboot_start_failed: Restart could not be started. Please reboot manually.
install_ready_reboot_status: Ro-ASD is ready. You can restart now.
install_failed_log_hint: INSTALLATION ERROR (check the logs for details).
auto_reboot_disabled: Installation successful. Automatic restart is disabled.
install_progress_complete: Installation completed successfully. You can restart the system.
stage_progress_partition_reset_disk: Resetting the disk and disconnecting mounts...
stage_progress_partition_full_disk: Resetting and configuring the whole disk: {disk}
stage_progress_partition_backup_table: Safety: backing up the existing partition table...
stage_progress_partition_find_free_space: Searching for contiguous free space on the disk...
stage_progress_partition_apply_manual_pl: Applying the manual plan to the disk...
stage_progress_format_manual_plan: Applying the user's disk configuration plan...
stage_progress_copy_scan_mounts: Scanning dynamic mount points and xattr support...
stage_progress_copy_live_root: Copying the live operating system root to the target disk...
stage_progress_copy_rsync_duration: This may take 5-15 minutes depending on disk speed. (Rsync is running...)
stage_progress_chroot_bind_mounts: Preparing root system bind mounts (chroot setup)...
stage_progress_chroot_language_support: Installing support packages for the selected language...
stage_progress_chroot_cleanup_live: Cleaning Live CD and old installer remnants...
stage_progress_chroot_vm_smoke: Preparing the VM first-boot smoke test service...
stage_progress_boot_write_firmware_entry: Writing the UEFI firmware boot entry...
stage_progress_post_validate_boot: Running boot validation for the installed system...
stage_progress_cleanup_unmount: Preserving system files and starting unmount...
artifact_footer: DIAGNOSTIC REPORT COMPLETED. Please review the output above.
stage_result_partition_manual_done: Manual partitioning plan applied to the disk.
stage_result_partition_shrink_not_needed: Existing free space is sufficient; shrinking is not required.
